theme_and_archetype.description: Strictly monochrome (Black & White). Raw, tuning/stance, editorial/racing aesthetic. Cinematic, rebellious, automotive zine meets racing poster.

typography.rules: Use ultra-condensed/bold fonts for headings, monospace for stats/metadata, and a clean sans-serif for body. NO italics unless explicitly needed for a 'speed' effect.

scales.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl lg:text-[10rem] uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.mono_labels: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-medium_gray

layout_and_spacing.grid: Asymmetric bento layouts. Heavy use of negative space.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Thick horizontal rules (border-b-2 or border-b-4 border-pure_white/20). Sharp corners ONLY (rounded-none).
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. py-24 md:py-40 for sections.

visual_effects.image_treatment: MANDATORY: ALL images must have 'grayscale contrast-125' Tailwind classes to enforce the monochrome zine aesthetic.
visual_effects.texture: Global noise/grain overlay (pointer-events-none, fixed, mix-blend-difference, opacity-10).
visual_effects.hover_states: Invert colors on hover (bg-pure_white text-pure_black) for buttons and cards. Aggressive scale transforms for images (hover:scale-105 duration-700).
visual_effects.animations: Lenis for smooth scrolling. Framer Motion for staggered reveals. CSS glitch effect for primary headings.
visual_effects.patterns: Subtle checkered flag patterns using CSS repeating-linear-gradient or SVG backgrounds in specific gaps.

hero.layout: 100vh height. Massive logo asset centered. Heavy grain. 'Start-light' sequence or RPM gauge animated on load.
hero.components: Marquee scrolling text at the bottom: 'RIDE N' NICE • FAMILY • SINCE 20XX'. Background features a darkened, high-contrast video/image with speed lines.

sobre_nosotros.layout: Split asymmetric layout. Left: Massive 'LA FAMILIA' vertical text. Right: Editorial paragraphs about the crew, with a staggered overlapping image.
sobre_nosotros.components: Tachometer line divider (0 to 9000 RPM styling) separating this section.

rutas.components: Embla/Shadcn Carousel. Cards feature large grayscale image, mono-font route specs (Distancia, Fecha, Dificultad), thick borders, inverted hover state.

galeria_de_coches.layout: Masonry or diagonal bento grid. Images must feel dense and cinematic.
galeria_de_coches.components: Hover effects: images zoom slowly, displaying driver/car specs (e.g., 'Honda CRX / Stance') in a brutalist mono tag.

proximos_eventos.layout: List-based timeline layout. Left column: Date (Mono font). Right column: Event Title and Location (Heading font). Thick borders between rows.
proximos_eventos.components: Interactive rows that reveal an image or map on hover.

redes_sociales.layout: Massive typography links taking up full viewport width. e.g., 'INSTAGRAM ↗', 'YOUTUBE ↗'.
redes_sociales.components: Hovering over text reveals a floating image cursor effect or strikes through the text.

unete_al_grupo.layout: Brutalist form layout. 2-column on desktop. Left: 'ÚNETE A LA CREW'. Right: The form.
unete_al_grupo.components: Inputs: border-b-2 ONLY, no side/top borders. bg-transparent. focus:border-pure_white. Submit button: massive, full width, inverted colors on hover.

hero_bg.usage: Hero background or parallax transition background

gallery_and_carousel.usage: Galeria Feature / Proximos Eventos hover image
Texture/Detail image for transitions or bento filler

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Maintain strict monochrome (black/white) palette. Do not add any color accents.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout instead of restrictive components.
Apply 'filter: grayscale(100%) contrast(120%)' to all images via Tailwind ('grayscale contrast-125').
Install and use 'react-fast-marquee' for the scrolling text elements.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (like arrows).
Install '@radix-ui/react-icons' or 'lucide-react' if needed, but rely mostly on typography.
Use 'framer-motion' for staggered text reveals and parallax effects.
Ensure the Form in 'Unete al Grupo' works with a standard backend POST handler or mock.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements as specified.
